> Part of [[ai-registry|AI Registry]]


# Google Antigravity

> AI Registry entry [AIR-34](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-34/google-antigravity) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-05-04. Departments: —.

**Category:** Cloud-Based IDE / AI-Assisted Development Platform
**Cost per User/Month:** Free (Google account)
**Departments:** Technology

## Overview

Google's cloud-based IDE — browser-based coding with AI-powered assistance via [[gemini|Gemini]]. Similar to [[vs-code|VS Code]] but cloud-only. Combines familiar editor interface with integrated [[google-cloud|Google Cloud]] and [[firebase|Firebase]] deployment. Branding history: Project IDX → [[firebase-studio|Firebase Studio]] → Antigravity.

## Capabilities

* Browser-based IDE
* Gemini AI coding assistance
* Multi-language (JS/TS, Python, Go, Dart/Flutter, Java)
* Integrated terminal
* Live preview for web apps
* Cloud workspaces (persistent)
* Multi-framework templates (React, Next.js, Angular, Flutter)
* Direct deployment to GCP, Firebase Hosting, Cloud Run
* Collaboration via shareable URLs
* Powers **natural-language mini-app building inside Google Search** (announced I/O 2026; rolling out to AI Pro/Ultra this summer) — Antigravity is the agentic-build engine behind the in-Search "mini-apps" experience. See [[2026-06-03-google-search-ai-platform-geo-shift]].

## Integrations

* Google Cloud ([[google-cloud|AIR-7]]) — native deployment
* Firebase ([[firebase-studio|AIR-31]]) — backend integration
* GitHub — repo import
* [[google-gemini|Google Gemini]] built-in
* Cloud Run for serverless
* Chrome DevTools

## Considerations

* Cloud-only — requires constant internet
* AI is Gemini-only — cannot use [[claude-code|Claude Code]] ([[claude-code|AIR-13]])
* Overlaps with VS Code ([[vs-code|AIR-15]]) + local setup
* Branding has shifted — assess product stability
* Limited offline capability

*Sandbox. Functional tier. Technology team evaluation.*
